summary: Iteration 72 - Gerante Advances feature (Avances de la Gérante pour rendre la monnaie). All backend (15/15) and frontend tests passed. New feature allows the manager to record personal cash advances when the register lacks change, and reimburse herself later from the register.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: gerante_advances.py router correctly implements all CRUD operations with proper validation (amount > 0)
Backend: 409 Conflict returned when trying to reimburse already reimbursed advance
Backend: cash_closures.py _compute_live_snapshot() correctly calculates expected_cash_in_drawer = cash + pending_advances - reimbursed_today
Backend: POST /api/cash-closures uses expected_cash_in_drawer for gap_cash calculation
Frontend: PointCaisseTab.jsx properly displays 'Avances de la Gérante' section with all required data-testid attributes
Frontend: 'Espèces attendues dans la caisse' shows correct calculation with explanation text
Frontend: Reimbursed today counter updates correctly after each reimbursement
seed_data_creation: Test advances created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 added Gerante Advances feature. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/DELETE /api/gerante-advances, GET /api/gerante-advances/summary, POST /api/gerante-advances/{id}/reimburse, POST /api/gerante-advances/reimburse-all. Frontend: 'Avances de la Gérante' section in Point de la Caisse tab with data-testids: gerante-advances-section, toggle-advance-form, advance-amount-input, advance-reason-input, advance-save-btn, advance-row-{id}, reimburse-advance-{id}, reimburse-all-advances. The expected_cash_in_drawer calculation includes pending advances.

GET /api/gerante-advances/summary → returns pending_total, pending_count, reimbursed_today_total - PASSED
POST /api/gerante-advances/{id}/reimburse on already reimbursed → 409 Conflict - PASSED
expected_cash_in_drawer = cash + pending_total when advance is pending - PASSED
